name: Blackbox AI
pricing_notes: Free tier (20 requests/day); Pro $20/mo unlimited; Business custom

auth.notes: API key from blackbox.ai account dashboard

performance.notes: Completion latency varies by model; code chat/search faster than generation

agent_readiness.notes: AI coding assistant with chat, code completion, and web search capabilities. VS Code extension primary delivery. REST API available but poorly documented. Includes code search (indexes 100M+ code repositories). Aimed at student/hobbyist market with generous free tier. API quality significantly below GitHub Copilot or Cursor.

gotchas: API documentation is sparse and often out of date
Code quality output below leading alternatives (Copilot, Codeium)
No formal SLA or enterprise support
Privacy policy and data usage less transparent than established competitors
Rate limits on free tier are very restrictive
best_when: Students or hobbyists needing free AI coding assistance
Low-stakes personal projects where quality variation is acceptable
Demos requiring AI coding features with minimal budget
summary: Blackbox AI is a code completion and chat tool targeting students and hobbyists with a generous free tier. VS Code extension is primary interface; REST API exists but is poorly documented. Code quality and API reliability are significantly below leading alternatives like GitHub Copilot or Codeium. Not recommended for production agentic pipelines or professional workflows.
